aboutCompany.descriptionParagraphs: Pristen is a software company I co-founded to deliver fast, custom-built digital solutions.
We work with companies that need to move quickly, solve real problems, and integrate tech into their processes without unnecessary complexity.
Our focus is on automation, system integration, and building tools that fit the way each business operates.
aboutMe.descriptionParagraphs: I'm a Tech Lead and full-stack developer focused on building and evolving reliable digital products.
I work on the evolution of products and business systems, bringing product thinking and technical execution together.

I work across critical operations, integrations, automation, and new initiatives. I also structure development processes and lead the incorporation of AI into the team's workflow to improve the quality, consistency, and speed of delivery.
aboutMe.title: About Me
footer.projectExplanation.description: This {{repoLink}} was built using Next.js with Static Export, chosen to streamline and simplify the development process. The project was deployed on GitHub Pages, and the entire deployment process is automated using GitHub Actions, ensuring a smooth and continuous delivery pipeline.

howICanHelp.items: ✅ Build custom tools or automation fast
✅ Connect and integrate different systems (APIs, ERPs, CRMs)
✅ Validate MVPs or ideas quickly, without heavy processes
✅ Improve performance and stability in existing software
✅ Structure scalable backends and clean service architectures
✅ Structure AI-assisted development workflows to improve delivery quality and speed
